action.reasoning: Observation: Best test AUC is 0.7584 (simple DKT). Recent attempts (hybrid, classic DKT gather) got 0.7582/0.7579. Variance is high, gap between val/test ~0.003. Analysis: To improve, try ensembling multiple seeds/models. Average predictions of 3-5 models should give a small but reliable boost. Decision: Train 5 DKT models with different seeds and ensemble in predict.py.
action.command: mkdir -p checkpoints && for i in 0 1 2 3 4; do python train.py $i checkpoints/seed$i.pt; done && cp checkpoints/seed0.pt checkpoints/best.pt
